name: Memphis Style Sweet Sauce for Ribs
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Garlic Powder (or 5 cloves of fresh garlic, minced fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients in a large heavy weight Dutch oven.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. For best results, serve the sauce at the table and baste the ribs only during the last half hour of cooking to glaze them slightly and prevent blackening on the outside.
4. If the sauce is applied too early, the sugar may darken the ribs' surface but will not affect taste.
